description: The Project Management Office (PMO) requires department tracking for the 'Enterprise Software Development Project' using the 'Text1' custom field. Assign the following department values to the first five tasks: 'Product' for Requirements Gathering, 'Engineering' for System Architecture Design and Database Schema Design, 'Design' for UI/UX Wireframes, and 'Management' for the Design Review Milestone. Save the project as an XML file to /home/ga/Projects/department_tagged.xml.
